Title: User Login Process
Preconditions: User has internet access and valid credentials.
Test Data:
- Valid email: user@example.com
- Valid password: Passw0rd!
- Invalid email: invalidemail
- Invalid password: wrongpassword
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to log in using valid email and password.
2. System checks if user is already logged in.
3. If not logged in, system initiates login process via Firebase Authentication API.
4. System retrieves current user from Firebase Authentication API.
5. If user is not logged in, system initiates registration and login process.
6. System creates user with email and password via Firebase Authentication API.
7. System retrieves current user after successful registration and login.
Expected Result:
- For valid credentials: User is successfully logged in.
- For invalid credentials: User is prompted to enter correct credentials.
- For registration: New user account is created and user is logged in.

Title: Retrieve Signals
Test Steps:
1. Application requests signals from Signal Management System.
2. Signal Management System forwards request to Data Management System.
3. Data Management System queries database for signals.
4. Database returns payload containing signal data.
5. Data Management System forwards payload back to Signal Management System.
6. Signal Management System forwards payload to Application.
7. Application receives and displays signal data.
Expected Result: - Application displays retrieved signal data.

Title: Display Null Signal Data
Preconditions: No signal data exists in the database.
Test Steps:
1. Application requests signals from Signal Management System.
2. Signal Management System forwards request to Data Management System.
3. Data Management System queries database for signals.
4. Database returns null payload.
5. Data Management System forwards null payload back to Signal Management System.
6. Signal Management System forwards null payload to Application.
7. Application receives and displays null signal data.
Expected Result: - Application displays message indicating no signal data available.

Title: Retrieve Train Variations
Test Steps:
1. Application requests train variations from Variation Management System.
2. Variation Management System forwards request to Data Management System.
3. Data Management System retrieves train information from database.
4. Data Management System forwards train information back to Variation Management System.
5. Variation Management System forwards train information to Application.
6. Application receives and displays train information.
Expected Result: - Application displays retrieved train variations.

Title: Insert Calendar Data
Test Steps:
1. Application sends calendar data to Calendar Management System.
2. Calendar Management System forwards calendar data to Data Management System.
3. Data Management System queries database for new calendar data.
4. Database returns status code.
5. Data Management System forwards outcome back to Calendar Management System.
6. Calendar Management System sends outcome to Application.
7. Application displays outcome.
Expected Result: - Application displays success message for inserting calendar data.

Title: Modify Calendar Data

2. Calendar Management System forwards modified calendar data to Data Management System.
3. Data Management System queries database for modified calendar data.
4. Database returns status code.
5. Data Management System forwards outcome back to Calendar Management System.
6. Calendar Management System sends outcome to Application.
7. Application displays outcome.
Expected Result: - Application displays success message for modifying calendar data.

Title: User Logout Process
Test Steps:
1. User initiates logout process.
2. System logs out user.
3. System clears session data.
4. System redirects user to login page.
Expected Result: - User is logged out and redirected to login page.

Title: Add Signal
Test Steps:
1. User adds new signal through application.
2. Signal Management System adds new signal.
3. Signal Management System updates database with new signal.
4. Signal Management System confirms addition to user.
Expected Result: - Confirmation message displayed to user indicating successful addition of signal.
